SELECT right_shift(num, i) AS shifted_value FROM test_shift CROSS JOIN shift_values;
SELECT num, right_shift(num, 0) AS no_shift FROM test_shift;
SELECT num, right_shift(num, 1) AS one_shift FROM test_shift;
SELECT num, right_shift(num, 8) AS eight_shift FROM test_shift WHERE num > 0;
SELECT t.num, s.i, right_shift(t.num, s.i) AS right_shifted FROM test_shift t JOIN shift_values s ON s.i < 8;
SELECT SUM(right_shift(num, 2)) AS total_shifted FROM test_shift;
CREATE VIEW shifted_view AS SELECT right_shift(num, 1) AS shifted_num FROM test_shift;
SELECT right_shift(MAX(num), 1) AS max_shifted FROM test_shift;
